---
title: "Software"
description-meta: "Open-source R packages developed and maintained by Connor L. Brown for aquatic ecology and stream data workflows."
open-graph:
  description: "Open-source R packages developed and maintained by Connor L. Brown for aquatic ecology and stream data workflows."
twitter-card:
  description: "Open-source R packages developed and maintained by Connor L. Brown for aquatic ecology and stream data workflows."
toc: true
number-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
source("R/render-software.R")
SOFTWARE_HTML <- load_software()
```

I develop and maintain open-source R packages for working with aquatic and stream-ecology data. All are released under the AGPL (>= 3) license — contributions and bug reports are welcome on GitHub.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
cat(SOFTWARE_HTML)
```
